How do I initiate Kraken Wallet customer service chat? ☎️ +1-((858))-423-8635 Click on the "Online chat" option to start a ☎️ +1-((858))-423-8635 Kraken Wallet customer service chat with our live agent (Mon-Fri, ( 9 AM to 6 PM). What are Kraken Wallet customer service hours? ☎️ +1-((858))-423-8635 Kraken Wallet customer service hours at ☎️ +1-((858))-423-8635 are Mon to Sat (9 AM to 7 PM) for general queries.
